title: arnica parviflora subsp. genuina
intro: Arnica parviflora subsp. genuina is a subspecies of the arnica plant, which is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a member of the sunflower family and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihistamine effects. The health benefits of arnica parviflora subsp. genuina include reducing pain and inflammation, improving wound healing, and relieving skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of arnica parviflora subsp. genuina include topical creams, salves, and ointments, as well as tinctures and capsules, which can be used to support the body's natural healing processes.
